hero.headline: TOMY Barber
hero.subheadline: Cut • Beard • Care — The art of men's grooming in a premium setting.

about.title: The Art of Modern Barbering
about.text: TOMY Barber combines tradition and modernity to offer an unparalleled men's haircut and grooming experience. Our expert barbers master the art of cutting, beard sculpting, and traditional shaving.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Tailored services for the discerning gentleman.

haircut.name: Men's Haircut
haircut.desc: Modern or classic cut adapted to your style and face shape.

beard.name: Beard Grooming
beard.desc: Beard sculpting and maintenance for a polished look.

shave.name: Traditional Shave
shave.desc: Old-fashioned hot towel shave with premium products.

styling.name: Styling & Finish
styling.desc: Blow-dry, styling products and professional finish.

treatment.name: Hair Treatments
treatment.desc: Nourishing treatments for hair and scalp.

reasons.title: Expert Barbers
reasons.desc: A passionate team trained in the latest trends.

reasons.title: Exclusive Atmosphere
reasons.desc: An elegant and relaxing setting for your comfort.

reasons.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
reasons.desc: Your satisfaction is our absolute priority.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Book your slot or request a quote.

form.name: Name

form.success: Thank you! We will contact you within 24h.
